sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69538" key="muwpa/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῠωπ-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n69538.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blink</tr_> the eyes, as shortsighted persons do : hence, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be shortsighted</tr_>, metaph., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg022.perseus-grc1:1:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">2 Ep.Pet.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
